title: EarthBound
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1994/1995 SNES design; genre evidence from archived Wii U Virtual Console product page (data-genre Action), observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Rolling HP drain and scripted encounter wit turn turn-based fights into tension management.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One battle grammar plus town inventory supports long authored travel without combat mode switches.
exemplar_rationale: Hybrid JRPG where modern-setting writing and battle timing share the loop.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo Wii U Virtual Console product page listed data-genre as: Action.
evidence.platform: Nintendo Store (archived Wii U Virtual Console)
